header.name: Nathan Cheng
subtitle: Designer who codes, with a background in film studies and graphic design.
Bridges design, development, and business needs to make complex systems legible.

sections.label: Skills
bullets: **Development:** JavaScript/React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Astro, Bun, Supabase, Zod, Framer Motion, Git, Cloudflare (Workers, R2, Zero Trust), OAuth 2.1, MCP and API integrations, Claude skills / MCP server development, agent context engineering, LLM prompt development
**Design & UX:** Interface design, Design systems, Information architecture, Visual design, Typography, CSS animation, Motion graphics, Accessibility (ARIA, keyboard handling)
**Tools & Platforms:** Claude Code, Cursor, Figma, Vercel, Cloudflare Pages, Netlify, Mintlify, Obsidian, Portainer, Synology DSM

entries.title: Personal portfolio site
bullets: **Designed and built a personal portfolio site** with filtered views by medium and category, shareable via URL state.
**Built motion details across the site,** including scroll-driven card stacking inspired by iOS notification physics and an animated hero.

**Consolidated content and media handling** to MDX in the repo + a single Cloudflare R2 bucket, replacing a Sanity CMS + Cloudinary split — so content edits ship in the same PRs as code and live as plain files coding agents can read and edit directly.

entries.title: Personal knowledge infrastructure
bullets: **Maintain a public library of 30+ Claude skills (~1K weekly installs) on Vercel's registry** — modular workflows that steer AI agents through knowledge maintenance, frontend code review, and project spec shaping.

**Built and published `obsidian-remote-mcp`,** an open-source server that lets remote AI clients work on an Obsidian vault. Access is layered so a client only reaches what's been exposed (OAuth 2.1 + PKCE, vault-path sandboxing, `.mcpignore`); the tool surface lets agents pull an outline, read one section, or update a single property instead of dumping whole files.

**Built and operate a Synology-based personal server stack** hosting a 5,000+ note Obsidian vault, a persistent Claude Code agent session, the `obsidian-remote-mcp` deployment, and supporting services. Auth via Cloudflare Zero Trust + Google SSO; containers on a custom Bun + Node base image rebuilt weekly.

entries.title: resume-renderer — one-schema, many-surfaces resume pipeline
bullets: **Built a resume-rendering pipeline** that turns one JSON source into a responsive web page, a print-perfect one-page PDF, a schema-validated JSON endpoint, and a Markdown outline — deployed as a static export at `res.nathancheng.cv`.
**Designed for swappability:** Zod discriminated union over section kinds; templates are React + Tailwind folders registered through a central index, so new layouts drop in without schema churn.

**Wired an agent-native publishing workflow end to end** — Claude.ai drafts variants from the live site's `/resume.md`, Claude Code reviews and commits, auto-deploy publishes. A positioning conversation can become a published change within minutes.

entries.title: Design and Systems Manager
entries.summary: Solo designer / systems manager at family-run B2B software company (users at NASA, Eli Lilly, 3M, EPA, Nestle).
bullets: **Built a Next.js + Supabase replacement for a 25-year-old Microsoft Access customer database (40,000+ records, decades of licensing history).** Solo, ~54 commits in 37 days from prototype to live deploy on real data; outside firms had quoted $25–60k for a from-scratch rebuild.

**Replatformed customer support docs off WordPress onto Mintlify** via a Firecrawl + Bun + Python pipeline that migrated 219 articles into ~224 MDX files, with a Claude Haiku agent handling repetitive cleanup — built as version-controlled, machine-readable docs structured so AI crawlers can read them cleanly.
**Designed workflow builder interface unifying 40+ configuration options:** studied Windows UI patterns, created component system with progressive disclosure for serial device communication.
**Reduced recurring setup questions ~30%** by producing a walkthrough video series replacing 90s-era documentation — scripted, recorded, and edited with motion graphics.

entries.title: Designer and Developer
bullets: **Built React/Next.js config generator for LLM interview chatbot,** reducing setup errors for screening question flows.
**Wrote Python script workaround to preserve image fidelity** when late-notice Techstars delivery requirements revealed Google Slides compression would degrade designs.
**Led pitch deck and narrative strategy for 3 Techstars startups** preparing for Demo Day — competitor analysis, problem-focused storytelling, visual direction for investor presentations.

entries.title: Fellowship at Venture for America (now Ember Fellowship)
bullets: **Selected for competitive entrepreneurship fellowship (10% acceptance);** trained in product strategy and design thinking with IDEO, Frog Design, and McKinsey workshops.
**Led 5-person team to win Judge Pick and Crowd Favorite in 3-day product sprint:** defined MVP scope, designed UI prototypes, pitched city exploration app to VC/executive panel.

entries.title: Web development foundations (The Odin Project) + Animations on the Web (Emil Kowalski)
Wesleyan University - B.A. in Film Studies, Minor in Integrated Design and Engineering
bullets: **3.71 GPA;** Honors, Dean's List; Frank Capra Prize for technical excellence in filmmaking and humor

**Led team to first place in videogame dev intensive led by Bethesda founder:** Managed 4-person team from concept to iOS demo, planned level structure and art direction, enhanced visuals in Unity game engine, pitched to industry jury (Harmonix, Warner Bros. Games, Demiurge)
